## Week in Review: 2026-06-29 to 2026-07-05

**One Nation** led search interest this week with an average score of 16.6.
The strongest combined search-and-sentiment score belonged to **One Nation**.

### Party Breakdown

- **Labor**: Avg interest 3.4 (-11.1% WoW), sentiment: neutral (-0.04)
- **Liberal**: Avg interest 4.0 (+7.7% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.16)
- **Greens**: Avg interest 2.3 (-50.0% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.22)
- **One Nation**: Avg interest 16.6 (-32.9% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.17)
- **Animal Justice**: Avg interest 0.0 (0% WoW), sentiment: neutral (+0.00)
- **Reason**: Avg interest 0.0 (0% WoW), sentiment: neutral (+0.00)
